arguments.summary: Read src/args.rs (32 lines). Simple arg parser with flags, values, positional args. No subcommand support. Need to add subcommand detection and per-subcommand parsing.

arguments.summary: All 4 tests pass. First non-flag arg is treated as subcommand. Remaining args parsed normally for the subcommand context.
arguments.final_answer: Added subcommand support to src/args.rs. First non-flag argument becomes the subcommand (Optional<String>). All subsequent flags/values/positional args are parsed per the subcommand context. Added subcommand field to Args struct. All 4 tests pass.
